metadata.description: Plan-first workflow orchestration for Claude Code. Zero external dependencies.

plugins.name: flow-code
plugins.description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking and Ralph autonomous mode (multi-model review gates). Worker subagent per task for context isolation. Prime assesses 8 pillars (48 criteria) with GitHub API integration. Includes 20 subagents, 11 commands, 16 skills.
